overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rainy cyberpunk rooftop terrace at night, approaching a futuristic Mizutani vehicle, entering it, driving across the rooftop, and then flying through a neon-lit cityscape. The footage features high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and vibrant neon lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy rooftop terrace with fire feature and landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet rooftop terrace toward the parked vehicle, passing illuminated planters and a fire pit

entered.detail: circular fire bowl with flames burning on the stone terrace
wet stone tiles reflecting ambient light from surrounding fixtures
rectangular planter with green foliage and integrated lighting
tall trees with uplighting visible in the background
tall buildings with colorful neon signage visible in the distance
black futuristic sports car with yellow and red stripes parked on the terrace

segments.scene_description: Walking across a rain-soaked rooftop terrace at night, passing a glowing fire pit and illuminated planter boxes. The wet stone pavement reflects the ambient lighting as a black Mizutani sports car comes into view near the terrace edge, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop parking area near terrace edge

agents.ego_description: approaching the black Mizutani vehicle, circling around to the driver's side door

segments.scene_description: Approaching the futuristic Mizutani vehicle parked on the terrace, circling around its sleek black body with yellow and red stripes. The camera moves closer to the driver's side as the terrace landscaping falls behind, preparing to enter the vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic vehicle cockpit with holographic dashboard

events.description: vehicle accelerates forward from stationary position across the rooftop
vehicle drives off building edge and camera perspective switches to external third-person view

agents.ego_description: operating the vehicle controls from the driver's seat, accelerating across the rooftop toward the building edge

entered.detail: futuristic dashboard with red illuminated controls and holographic displays
futuristic steering wheel with integrated controls
red glowing holographic interface elements floating above the dashboard

segments.scene_description: From the first-person driver's perspective inside the cockpit, operating the futuristic vehicle's controls with red holographic dashboard displays visible. The vehicle accelerates across the wet rooftop terrace, driving toward the building edge as the city skyline looms ahead through the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial cyberpunk cityscape with neon billboards

events.description: vehicle transitions from ground driving to aerial flight mode, ascending above the city streets

agents.ego_description: piloting the flying vehicle through the neon-lit cyberpunk city, navigating between towering skyscrapers

entered.detail: black flying vehicle viewed from behind with red taillights illuminated
tall buildings covered in vibrant purple, cyan, and yellow digital advertisements
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle launches off the rooftop and begins flying through the dense neon-lit cyberpunk city. From a third-person perspective following behind, the black Mizutani car soars between towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant digital billboards and colorful neon advertisements, navigating the aerial space above the illuminated streets below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a rain-soaked rooftop terrace into a high-speed aerial flight through a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by gliding across wet stone pavement past glowing fire pits and illuminated planters, moving toward a sleek black Mizutani sports car parked against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers. As the camera circles the vehicle's striped body and transitions into the cockpit, the perspective shifts to the driver's seat where red holographic displays flicker before the car accelerates across the rooftop. The scene then launches off the building's edge, shifting to a trailing view as the vehicle soars away from the terrace. Finally, the car navigates the dense urban canyon, weaving between massive digital billboards and vibrant neon advertisements high above the illuminated streets.
